pybenzdb.criteria.query_criterion module

class pybenzdb.criteria.query_criterion.Query_Criterion(key: str, description: str)[source]

Bases: Criterion

This class allows for representing the desired query.

element

The widget used for selecting the desired query

Type:

Select

get_criterion() → str[source]

Returns the JSON string corresponding to the criterion, or an empty string if the criterion is not set

Returns:

The JSON string corresponding to the criterion or an empty string if the criterion is not set

Return type:

str
